subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Be thou not dismayed by the tyranny of kinsmen and the estrangement of brothers. This is not the first vessel to be broken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از جور خویشان و احتجاب اخوان محزون مباش لیس هذا اول قاروره
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @thankfulness; gratitude
